profile_name: Agentic 架构与全栈软硬件协同设计

section_labels.agentic_architecture: Agentic 架构 / 自动设计空间探索
section_labels.hpc_cross_over: HPC x 架构 / 编译器 / 运行时

recommendations.title: Agentic AI-Driven Microarchitecture Design Space Exploration
recommendations.abstract: An LLM-driven hardware design agent explores cache replacement policy and data prefetcher candidates through cycle-accurate simulation with gem5 for computer architecture discovery.
affiliations: Center for AI-Driven Systems, Example Institute
recommendations.tldr: 研究问题：这篇论文关注如何用 LLM agent 自动探索微架构设计空间。核心方法：它把候选生成、gem5 周期级仿真和下一轮设计改进串成闭环。关键结论：摘要显示该方法能围绕 cache replacement 与 data prefetcher 生成可评估方案。推荐理由：它直接命中 agentic architecture、Auto-DSE 和 simulator-guided search，是当前画像的核心方向。

recommendations.title: Compiler Architecture Co-design for RISC-V Custom Accelerators
recommendations.abstract: The method performs full-stack co-design across MLIR, runtime scheduling, workload mapping, and a RISC-V custom extension for a domain-specific accelerator.
affiliations: Systems and Hardware Co-design Group, Example Research Lab
recommendations.tldr: 研究问题：这篇论文关注 RISC-V 自定义加速器如何与编译器和运行时协同设计。核心方法：它把 MLIR、runtime scheduling、workload mapping 与 ISA extension 放在同一优化链路。关键结论：摘要显示全栈协同能让领域专用加速器更贴近 workload。推荐理由：它命中 full-stack HW/SW co-design、compiler architecture co-design 和 domain-specific accelerator。
